# Robert Echevarria

> A rational take on what AI actually does. Founder and CEO of Buildwise Media. Running an AI-native operation for service businesses across North America.

## About

Robert Echevarria runs AI in a real business every day. He founded an AI-native marketing agency that serves service businesses doing $1M–$5M in revenue across North America, building the systems that let owners stop trading time for growth. His perspective: most operators don't have a strategy problem — they have a tooling problem. The strategy is fine. The instinct is fine. What's missing is the system that turns instinct into compounding output.

## What I Do

- **Buildwise Media** — AI-native marketing agency for service businesses ($1M–$5M revenue). Full-service marketing execution powered by AI agents and automation. Atlanta, GA. https://buildwisemedia.com
- **The Dark Factory Newsletter** — Writing about building with AI at the business level. Not theory. Not hype. What's actually working, what's actually changing, and what to do about it.
- **LinkedIn long-form** — Posts on AI adoption, business operations, what the technology actually does today. First-person, working-it-out register.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://robertechevarria.com/): Bio, positioning, social links, newsletter signup
- [The Harder You Work](https://robertechevarria.com/newsletter/the-harder-you-work): Newsletter issue on why AI makes high performers work more, not less
